ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "current_team" TEXT /* Current team of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., Rookie, Age 22, Starter, Overall) */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player was on during the season */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Arena where the team plays home games */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (city, state) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is part of */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_career_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone (e.g., 10,000 points, 5,000 assists) */,
  "date_achieved" TEXT /* Date the milestone was achieved */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the milestone */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Stat value associated with the milestone (e.g., 10,000, 5,000) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_career_milestones_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_college_stats" (
  "college_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the college career */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Average assists per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Average blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Average turnovers per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_college_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement (e.g., All-Star, MVP) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the achievement was won */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the achievement */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the injury started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the player returned from the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "team_affiliation" TEXT /* Team the user is affiliated with (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., team office, home) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted with */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_drafts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
